review_comment: This was introduced with https://github.com/astral-sh/uv/commit/cf3093283100ef7ff916ce2b7e9cc0061adb2886#diff-49326157b193e4affae1b7a1c56c7c7e1ea2039168e33948b6c30a4fe7f4ef9eR76, where the `Dist::from_url` dropped the information. Is there an argument that the lookahead should or shouldn't consider editables?
I think it's because we currently assume editables can't be transitive deps.
